Forge is treating this as a [react] based on your prompt. Generating plan...

<thought>
I need to create a full-stack restaurant management application with 24 specific files.
I will follow the `TASK_MANAGEMENT` instructions:
1. List all files to be created.
2. Create them one by one using `str_replace_editor` with `command="create"`.
3. Use `note` to checkpoint progress.
4. No verification between files.

Files to create:
1. package.json
2. tsconfig.json
3. next.config.js
4. prisma/schema.prisma
5. src/app/layout.tsx
6. src/app/page.tsx
7. src/app/globals.css
8. src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
9. src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts
10. src/app/api/menu/route.ts
11. src/app/api/orders/route.ts
12. src/app/dashboard/page.tsx
13. src/app/menu/page.tsx
14. src/app/orders/page.tsx
15. src/app/auth/login/page.tsx
16. src/app/auth/register/page.tsx
17. src/lib/prisma.ts
18. src/lib/auth.ts
19. src/components/Navbar.tsx
20. src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx
21. src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx
22. src/components/OrderTable.tsx
23. src/middleware.ts
24. .env.example

I will start by creating these files.
</thought>
